title: Local Only Memory Continuity
goal: Resolve #328 with a small opt-in local-only memory surface for repo-scoped machine-local continuity.
Expose the feature through compact package output without making local knowledge authoritative or checked in.
non_goals: Do not sync local memory across machines.
Do not store secrets or credentials.
Do not make local-only memory override checked-in Memory, config, planning, or repo doctrine.
Do not build a broad search layer or personal knowledge system.

intent.outcome: Local config can opt into a clearly local memory path, report/preflight expose the status and boundary, and docs/tests define manual promotion guidance.
intent.constraints: Disabled unless enabled by local config; local records stay ignored/removable/advisory; promotion to checked-in Memory is manual.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest config fields, path convention, report payload, and documentation needed for the first slice.
intent.escalation: Stop if implementation would require a new memory database, automatic promotion, or secret storage handling.

execution.next_step: Archive this execplan, commit, push, and close #328.
execution.proof: Tests plus live report/preflight show disabled default and local-memory posture.

touched: docs or .agentic-workspace docs for local-only memory guidance
invariants: Local-only memory is advisory and non-authoritative.
No checked-in local records are created by default.
The feature is controlled by local config.

required_continuation.activation trigger: local memory remains invisible to compact startup/report surfaces or lacks a safe promotion boundary

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Machine-local continuity can be represented without promoting weak/private context into checked-in Memory.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Any automatic ingestion, search, sync, or promotion workflow.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Local-only continuity belongs in config/report/preflight posture, not checked-in Memory records or automatic promotion.

intent_interpretation.literal request: execute all planned work lane by lane and dogfood the package
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: complete #328's first small local-only memory slice
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: local config switch, ignored local path convention, compact reporting, and promotion guidance
intent_interpretation.review guidance: reject work that turns local-only memory into hidden repo authority or broad memory infrastructure

execution_bounds.allowed paths: workspace config/report source and contracts; memory/workspace docs only for boundary guidance; tests; active planning state and this execplan
execution_bounds.required validation commands: focused pytest for config/report changes; uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: stop before broad memory package refactors or automatic promotion behavior

stop_conditions.stop when: the first local-only memory slice is shipped, dogfooded, committed, pushed, and #328 is closed or residual work is routed
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: the design needs secret handling, synchronization, or authority over checked-in Memory
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: implementation becomes a broad memory subsystem
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: live compact outputs do not make local-memory status discoverable

context_budget.live working set: #328, config/report code, local override schema, memory boundary docs, active execplan
context_budget.recoverable later: full memory package history and old local integration lane details
context_budget.externalize before shift: update this execplan execution_run and immediate_next_action
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace summary and gh issue view #328
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: inspect only boundary docs/surfaces if compact code context is insufficient
context_budget.tiny resumability note: add advisory local-memory config/reporting without creating checked-in local memory records
context_budget.context-shift triggers: local config support is larger than expected or memory package changes become necessary

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: disabled by default; advisory only; local/removable; no automatic promotion
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: field names, default path, and whether report or preflight carries the compact status
delegated_judgment.escalate when: the feature would become authoritative, synced, secret-bearing, or broad

invariants: Local-only records are not checked in.
Promotion to checked-in Memory is manual.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Local-only memory is controlled by local config and reported as advisory status, not active repo authority.
open_questions_to_close: Closed: use [local_memory] enabled/path in local config, defaulting to .agentic-workspace/local/memory.toml.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "local_memory or config_command"
completion_criteria: Local config can enable it and set or expose a local path.
Compact output reports enabled/disabled status, advisory boundary, path, and promotion guidance.
Docs/tests state it is not shared repo authority and should not store secrets.

execution_run.what happened: Added disabled-by-default local-only memory config support, report/preflight exposure, contract schemas, text output, docs, and tests.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace config/report/preflight source, workspace contracts, workspace docs, focused CLI tests, and active planning state
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "local_memory or config_command_reports_effective_defaults_without_repo_file or defaults_command_reports_machine_readable_default_routes_as_json or report_real_init_summarizes_combined_workspace_state or preflight"; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/config.py src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_output.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run pytest -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check
execution_run.result for continuation: No local-memory follow-up required for #328; continue with python-consumable-contract-extraction.

proof_report.validation proof: focused tests, full pytest, ruff, contract surface check, maintainer surfaces, live report/preflight/summary, planning checker, and diff whitespace check all passed; git diff --check only reported the existing state.toml line-ending warning.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: report/preflight expose local_memory disabled by default with advisory boundary, local path, record shape, promotion guidance, and boundary rules; tests cover defaults, local override, report, and preflight.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Add opt-in local-only memory for machine-local agent continuity.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Local config now supports [local_memory] enabled/path, compact report/preflight expose status and advisory boundaries, docs define non-authoritative/no-secret/manual-promotion behavior, and tests validate the contract.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve only context that is expensive to rediscover while keeping shared residue bounded and reviewable.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer one local, opt-in, advisory surface over broad checked-in memory expansion.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this make same-machine continuation cheaper without creating hidden repo doctrine?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The implementation satisfies #328's opt-in local-only continuity request without creating authoritative, synced, secret-bearing, or broad memory behavior.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: this execplan proof_report plus tests and live report/preflight output
closure_check.reopen trigger: local-only memory remains undiscoverable or becomes authoritative

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Opt-in local-only memory continuity is discoverable through config, report, and preflight while remaining advisory, local, ignored, and manually promoted.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused tests, full pytest, ruff, contract checks, maintainer surfaces, live report/preflight/summary, planning checker, and diff check
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Docs and config contracts updated; no checked-in local memory records created.

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted #328 local-only memory continuity from the roadmap.
